language.title: Choose your language
language.subtitle: You can change this later in settings.

welcome.title: Welcome to CV Studio
welcome.subtitle: We'll build your resume step by step — in less than 10 minutes.

field.title: What do you do?
field.subtitle: Pick your field — we'll customize everything for you.

specialization.title: What's your focus?
specialization.subtitle: Optional — helps us ask better questions.

level.title: How much experience do you have?
level.subtitle: We'll pick the best layout for you automatically.

about.title: Tell me about yourself in 2 lines
about.subtitle: Don't know what to write? I'll write it for you.
about.placeholder: e.g. I help teams build reliable software...

experience.title: Where did you work?
experience.subtitle: What did you do there?
experience.descPh: Describe what you did — we'll turn it into professional bullets
experience.improveTip: This looks a bit short. Want me to make it more professional?

projects.title: Tell me about a project you're proud of
projects.subtitle: Optional — skip if you prefer.

skills.title: Have you worked with these?
skills.subtitle: Tap Yes or No — we'll build your skills list.

editor.explainSummary: A strong summary tells recruiters who you are in 2–3 lines. Resume systems scan it for keywords.
editor.explainExperience: Use action verbs and measurable results. Each bullet should show impact.

ai.managedCopy: Users do not need API keys. CV Studio sends AI requests to the server, and the server uses the owner API key.
ai.localKey: Optional fallback for local testing only. Production uses the server key.
ai.promptPreview: Show prompt preview before sending to AI

empty.summary: No summary yet. Add 2-3 lines about yourself.
empty.experience: No experience yet. Add your work history or training.
empty.projects: No projects yet. Add your personal or academic projects.
empty.skills: No skills yet. Add your technical and soft skills.

examples.summary: Software Developer with 3+ years of experience building web applications. Passionate about clean code and user experience. Skilled in JavaScript, React, and Node.js.
examples.experience: Built and maintained web applications using React and Node.js. Implemented RESTful APIs and integrated third-party services. Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver features on time.
examples.projects: E-commerce platform built with React and Node.js. Implemented shopping cart, payment integration, and user authentication. Deployed on AWS with CI/CD pipeline.

landing.title: Build a resume that gets you hired
landing.subtitle: Professional templates. AI-powered writing. ATS-optimized. Create your resume in minutes, not hours.
landing.featFastDesc: Create your resume in under 10 minutes with our step-by-step builder.
landing.featTemplatesDesc: Choose from 12+ professionally designed templates for every industry.
landing.featAiDesc: Let AI write your summary, improve your bullets, and suggest skills.
landing.featAtsDesc: Beat applicant tracking systems with our optimized formats.
landing.readySubtitle: Join thousands of professionals who got hired with CV Studio
landing.heroTitle: Build a professional resume that helps you get hired.
landing.heroTrusted: Trusted by thousands of job seekers.
landing.featAiWriteDesc: Our AI helps you craft the perfect summary and professional bullets tailored to your industry.
landing.featProTmplDesc: Choose from our library of beautiful, ATS-optimized layouts.
landing.featPdfExportDesc: Download your pixel-perfect resume in PDF format instantly.
landing.featBilingualDesc: Create your resume in Arabic, English, or both seamlessly.
landing.featSmartSugDesc: Get smart recommendations for skills and experiences based on your job title.
landing.test1Text: CV Studio helped me land my dream job in tech. The AI suggestions were incredibly helpful!
landing.test2Text: I loved how easy it was to create a bilingual resume. Highly recommended.
landing.test3Text: The ATS-optimized templates are top-notch. I started getting interviews immediately.

onboarding.title: Let's build your resume
onboarding.subtitle: Choose how you'd like to get started

wz.errEmail: Hmm... That email doesn't look right.
wz.stepEduPh: e.g. BSc Computer Science, Cairo University
wz.stepProj: Tell me about a project you're proud of

ed.empty_edit: Click a field to edit this section.

form.summary_hint: Write 2–3 sentences about your experience and goals. Be specific.
form.ph_summary: e.g. Software Engineer with 5+ years building scalable web apps...

ai_panel.empty: Your resume looks great! No suggestions right now.

empty_states.experience: No experience yet. Add your first job below.
empty_states.projects: No projects yet. Showcase your work!
empty_states.skills: No skills yet. Add your top skills.

coach.title: AI Coach
coach.ready: Ready to export. Do one last visual scan, then download.
coach.next_copy: Best next improvements for this CV.
coach.export_anyway: There are important issues. Export anyway?

greetings.accountant: In accounting, practical training and ERP proficiency are much more important than independent projects.
greetings.developer: In your field, a portfolio and practical projects are what sets you apart.
greetings.default: At your current level, highlighting specialized skills clearly is the key to success.

advice.add_internship: Add an internship or practical training
advice.add_excel_erp: Add Excel or ERP proficiency if available
advice.add_project: Add at least one project (with a link)
advice.focus_activities: Focus on highlighting training and student activities
advice.use_action_verbs: Use strong action verbs like "Managed" or "Developed" in experience
advice.include_skills: Ensure you include in-demand skills in your field

ats.common_skills: Common skills in your field (add what you know):
ats.all_good: Great! You have added most common skills.
ats.do_you_have_exp: Do you have actual experience with {keyword}?
